scripts.fonts:copy: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');const d='public/fonts';fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});const fonts=[['@fontsource-variable/inter','inter-latin-wght-normal.woff2'],['@fontsource-variable/dm-sans','dm-sans-latin-wght-normal.woff2'],['@fontsource-variable/playfair-display','playfair-display-latin-wght-normal.woff2'],['@fontsource-variable/source-serif-4','source-serif-4-latin-wght-normal.woff2'],['@fontsource-variable/fraunces','fraunces-latin-wght-normal.woff2'],['@fontsource-variable/libre-franklin','libre-franklin-latin-wght-normal.woff2'],['@fontsource-variable/source-sans-3','source-sans-3-latin-wght-normal.woff2']];fonts.forEach(([pkg,f])=>fs.copyFileSync(p.join('node_modules',pkg,'files',f),p.join(d,f)));['400','500','600','700'].forEach(w=>{['ibm-plex-sans','merriweather','geist-sans'].forEach(f=>{const s=p.join('node_modules','@fontsource',f,'files',f+'-latin-'+w+'-normal.woff2');if(fs.existsSync(s))fs.copyFileSync(s,p.join(d,f+'-latin-'+w+'-normal.woff2'))})});console.log('Fonts copied to public/fonts/')"
scripts.translate: npm run translate:pot && npm run translate:update
scripts.translate:update: for file in ./resources/lang/*.po; do wp i18n update-po ./resources/lang/brndle.pot $file; done
scripts.translate:compile: npm run translate:mo && npm run translate:js
